sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-14 06:56
- Distance: 10.4 km
- Moving time: 1:01:27
- Elapsed time: 1:01:32
- Elevation gain: 43.6 m
- Average heart rate: 163.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 212.4 W
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `163.9 bpm`, ranging from `147.0` to `174.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `160.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `167.5 bpm` (+7.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.8 spm`, with a working range of `143.3` to `190.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `175.7 spm` (+1.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:56 /km` across `10.371 km` in `1:01:27` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:12 /km` and second-half pace was `5:39 /km` (-33 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.9 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `160.4 bpm` in the first half and `167.8 bpm` in the second (+7.4 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `1:01:27` out of `1:01:32` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `57.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `18.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `40.6 m` in the first half and `17.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
